trans-unit.source: Firefox uses your camera to scan QR codes and take photos and video.
trans-unit.target: Isto permítelle facer fotos e subilas.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Camera Usage Description

trans-unit.source: Firefox requires Face ID to access your saved passwords and payment methods.
trans-unit.target: Firefox require Face ID para acceder aos teus contrasinais e aos métodos de pago gardados.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Face ID Usage Description

trans-unit.source: Websites you visit may request your location.
trans-unit.target: Os sitios web que visita poden solicitar a súa localización.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Location When In Use Usage Description

trans-unit.source: Firefox uses your microphone to record and upload audio.
trans-unit.target: Isto permítelle facer vídeos e subilos.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Microphone Usage Description
Privacy - Photo Library Additions Usage Description
Label for preview action on Tab Tray Tab to add current tab to Bookmarks
Label for preview action on Tab Tray Tab to close the current tab
Label for preview action on Tab Tray Tab to copy the URL of the current tab to clipboard
String describing the action of opening the last added bookmark from the home screen Quick Actions via 3D Touch
Accessibility label, associated to the 3D Touch action on the current tab in the tab tray, used to display a larger preview of the tab.
Label for preview action on Tab Tray Tab to send the current tab to another device
Text displayed above the input field when changing the existing passcode

trans-unit.id: Use your fingerprint to access Logins now.
trans-unit.source: Use your fingerprint to access Logins now.
trans-unit.target: Usa a pegada dixital para acceder as identificacións.
trans-unit.note: Touch ID prompt subtitle when accessing logins
The cancel button when confirming clear history.
The confirmation button that clears history even when Sync is connected.

trans-unit.id: This action will clear all of your private data, including history from your synced devices.
trans-unit.source: This action will clear all of your private data, including history from your synced devices.
trans-unit.target: Esta acción borrará todos os seus datos privados, incluíndo o historial dos seus dispositivos sincronizados.
trans-unit.note: Description of the confirmation dialog shown when a user tries to clear history that's synced to another device.
Settings item for clearing browsing history
Settings item for clearing the cache
Settings item for clearing cookies
Settings item for deleting downloaded files

trans-unit.target: Datos de sitios web sen conexión
trans-unit.note: Settings item for clearing website data
Settings item for clearing passwords and login data
The cancel button when confirming clear private data.
The button that clears private data.

trans-unit.id: This action will clear all of your private data. It cannot be undone.
trans-unit.source: This action will clear all of your private data. It cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: Esta acción borrará todos os seus datos privados. Non é posíbel desfacer esta acción.
trans-unit.note: Description of the confirmation dialog shown when a user tries to clear their private data.

trans-unit.source: Making Firefox your default browser is a vote for an open, accessible internet.
trans-unit.target: Facer Firefox o seu navegador predeterminado é un voto por unha Internet aberta e accesíbel.
trans-unit.note: Description for small home tab banner shown that allows the user to switch their default browser to Firefox.

trans-unit.target: Unha mellor Internet de forma predeterminada
trans-unit.note: Title for small home tab banner shown that allows the user to switch their default browser to Firefox.
Button string to learn how to set your default browser.

trans-unit.source: Set links from websites, emails, and Messages to open automatically in Firefox.
trans-unit.target: Estableza ligazóns de sitios web, correos electrónicos e mensaxes para que se abran automaticamente en Firefox.
trans-unit.note: Description for small home tab banner shown that allows user to switch their default browser to Firefox.

trans-unit.source: Choose Firefox as your default browser to make speed, safety, and privacy automatic.
trans-unit.target: Escolla Firefox como o seu navegador predeterminado para que a velocidade, a seguridade e a privacidade sexan automáticas.
trans-unit.note: Description for small home tab banner shown that allows the user to switch their default browser to Firefox.
Title for small home tab banner shown that allows the user to switch their default browser to Firefox.

trans-unit.source: Firefox blocks 3,000+ trackers per user each month on average. Make us your default browser for privacy peace of mind.
trans-unit.target: Firefox bloquea máis de 3.000 rastrexadores por usuario cada mes de media. Convértanos no seu navegador predeterminado para a súa tranquilidade e privacidade.
trans-unit.note: Description for small home tab banner shown that allows the user to switch their default browser to Firefox.
Title for small home tab banner shown that allows the user to switch their default browser to Firefox.
Title for small home tab banner shown that allows user to switch their default browser to Firefox.
Button string to open settings that allows user to switch their default browser to Firefox.
Description for default browser onboarding card.

trans-unit.target: 2. Pulse a Aplicación do navegador por defecto
trans-unit.note: Description for default browser onboarding card.
Description for default browser onboarding card.
Text for the screenshot of the iOS system settings page for Firefox.
Menu option for setting Firefox as default browser.
Shown in error pages for files that can't be shown and need to be downloaded.
Shown in error pages on a button that will try to load the page again
Done button in Find in Page Toolbar.
Text selection menu item
Accessibility label for next result button in Find in Page Toolbar.
Accessibility label for previous result button in Find in Page Toolbar.
Action button for deleting history entries in the history panel.
Sign in to Firefox account button on second intro screen.
Title for the first panel 'Welcome' in the First Run tour.
See http://mzl.la/1T8gxwo
Button for larger reader font size. Keep this extremely short! This is shown in the reader mode toolbar.
Button for smaller reader font size. Keep this extremely short! This is shown in the reader mode toolbar.

trans-unit.id: A username and password are being requested by %@.
trans-unit.source: A username and password are being requested by %@.
trans-unit.target: %@ está a solicitar un número de usuario e contrasinal.
trans-unit.note: Authentication prompt message with no realm. Parameter is the hostname of the site

trans-unit.id: A username and password are being requested by %@. The site says: %@
trans-unit.source: A username and password are being requested by %1$@. The site says: %2$@
trans-unit.target: %1$@ está a solicitar un nome de usuario e contrasinal. O sitio di: %2$@
trans-unit.note: Authentication prompt message with a realm. First parameter is the hostname. Second is the realm string
Button for reader mode font size. Keep this extremely short! This is shown in the reader mode toolbar.
About settings section title
Section title label for recently visited websites
The title for the setting page which lets you select the number of top site rows
Accessibility label for the Add Tab button in the Tab Tray.
Name for button adding current article to reading list in reader mode
Button to dismiss the 'Add Pass Failed' alert. See https://support.apple.com/HT204003 for context on Wallet.

trans-unit.source: An error occured while adding the pass to Wallet. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Produciuse un erro ao engadir o «pass» a Wallet. Tente de novo máis tarde.
trans-unit.note: Text of the 'Add Pass Failed' alert. See https://support.apple.com/HT204003 for context on Wallet.
Title of the 'Add Pass Failed' alert. See https://support.apple.com/HT204003 for context on Wallet.

trans-unit.target: Engadiuse a páxina á lista de lectura
trans-unit.note: Accessibility message e.g. spoken by VoiceOver after the current page gets added to the Reading List using the Reader View button, e.g. by long-pressing it or by its accessibility custom action.
Accessibility label for address and search field, both words (Address, Search) are therefore nouns.
Used as a button label for crash dialog prompt
Tile title for Amazon
Authentication prompt title
Accessibility label for the Back button in the tab toolbar.
Block pop-up windows setting
The label for the Title field when editing a bookmark
The label for the URL field when editing a bookmark
Toggle bookmarks syncing setting
The button on the snackbar to edit a bookmark after adding it.
The button to edit a bookmark
The button to edit a folder
The label to show the location of the folder where the bookmark is located
The button to create a new bookmark
The button to create a new folder
The button to create a new separator
The label for the title of a bookmark
Describes the date on which the breach occurred

trans-unit.source: Passwords were leaked or stolen since you last changed your password. To protect this account, log in to the site and change your password.
trans-unit.target: Houbo contrasinais que se filtraron ou roubaron desde a última vez que cambiou o seu contrasinal. Para protexer esta conta, conéctese ao sitio e cambie o seu contrasinal.
trans-unit.note: Description of what a breach is
Link to monitor.firefox.com to learn more about breached passwords
Leads to a link to the breached website
Title for the Breached Login Detail View.
Accessibility label for brightness adjustment slider in Reader Mode display settings
Label for Cancel button
Accessibility hint for the color theme setting buttons in reader mode display settings
Accessibility hint for the font type buttons in reader mode display settings
The button to open a new tab with the copied link
Message displayed when the user has a copied link on the clipboard
Accessibility label for action denoting closing a tab in tab list (tray)
Accessibility label (used by assistive technology) notifying the user that the tab is being closed.
Context menu item for bookmarking a link URL
The label text in the Button Toast for switching to a fresh New Private Tab.
The button text in the Button Toast for switching to a fresh New Tab.
The label text in the Button Toast for switching to a fresh New Tab.
Context menu item for copying an image to the clipboard
Context menu item for copying an image URL to the clipboard
Context menu item for copying a link URL to the clipboard
Context menu item for downloading a link URL
Context menu item for opening a link in a new tab
Context menu item for saving an image
Context menu item for sharing a link URL

trans-unit.id: Could not add page to Reading List. Maybe it’s already there?
trans-unit.source: Could not add page to Reading List. Maybe it’s already there?
trans-unit.target: Non foi posíbel engadir a páxina á lista de lectura. Quizais xa fora engadida previamente.
trans-unit.note: Accessibility message e.g. spoken by VoiceOver after the user wanted to add current page to the Reading List and this was not done, likely because it already was in the Reading List, but perhaps also because of real failures.

trans-unit.id: Could not add page to Reading list
trans-unit.source: Could not add page to Reading list
trans-unit.target: Non foi posíbel engadir a páxina á lista de lectura
trans-unit.note: Accessibility message e.g. spoken by VoiceOver after adding current webpage to the Reading List failed.

trans-unit.target: Non foi posíbel cargar a páxina.
trans-unit.note: Error message that is shown in settings when there was a problem loading

trans-unit.source: Built-in Enhanced Tracking Protection helps stop ads from following you around. Turn on Strict to block even more trackers, ads, and popups.
trans-unit.target: A protección avanzada incorporada contra o seguimento axuda a que os anuncios non poidan facer un seguimento da súa actividade en Internet. Activa o modo estrito para bloquear incluso máis rastrexadores, anuncios e xanelas emerxentes.
trans-unit.note: Description for the new ETP mode i.e. standard vs strict
Text for the new ETP settings button

trans-unit.target: Protección contra o seguimento de anuncios
trans-unit.note: Title for the new ETP mode i.e. standard vs strict
See http://mzl.la/1Qtkf0j
Dark theme setting in Reading View settings
Accessibility label for button decreasing font size in display settings of reader mode
Title for default search engine picker.
Name for display settings button in reader mode. Display in the meaning of presentation, not monitor.
Done button on left side of the Settings view controller title bar
Used as a button label for crash dialog prompt
Panel accessibility label
The label of the button the user will press to start downloading a file
Button confirming the cancellation of the download.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to cancel this download?
trans-unit.target: Confirma que quere cancelar esta descarga?
trans-unit.note: Alert dialog body when the user taps the cancel download icon.
Button declining the cancellation of the download.
Alert dialog title when the user taps the cancel download icon.
The label text in the Download Cancelled toast for showing confirmation that the download was cancelled.
The label text in the Download Failed toast for showing confirmation that the download has failed.
The button to open a new tab with the Downloads home panel
The description text in the Download progress toast for showing the number of files when multiple files are downloading.

The description text in the Download progress toast for showing the number of files (1$) and download progress (2$). This string only consists of two placeholders for purposes of displaying two other strings side-by-side where 1$ is Downloads.Toast.MultipleFiles.DescriptionText and 2$ is Downloads.Toast.Progress.DescriptionText. This string should only consist of the two placeholders side-by-side separated by a single space and 1$ should come before 2$ everywhere except for right-to-left locales.
The description text in the Download progress toast for showing the downloaded file size (1$) out of the total expected file size (2$).
Action button for deleting downloaded files in the Downloads panel.

trans-unit.source: Downloaded files will show up here.
trans-unit.note: Title for the Downloads Panel empty state.
Action button for sharing downloaded files in the Downloads panel.
Text message in the settings table view
Label for button to perform advanced actions on the error page

trans-unit.source: Warning: we can’t confirm your connection to this website is secure.
trans-unit.target: Aviso: non lle podemos confirmar que a súa conexión a este sitio web é segura.
trans-unit.note: Warning text when clicking the Advanced button on error pages

trans-unit.source: It may be a misconfiguration or tampering by an attacker. Proceed if you accept the potential risk.
trans-unit.target: Pode que sexa unha mala configuración ou unha tentativa de ataque. Continúe se acepta o posible risco.
trans-unit.note: Additional warning text when clicking the Advanced button on error pages

trans-unit.source: The owner of %@ has configured their website improperly. To protect your information from being stolen, Firefox has not connected to this website.
trans-unit.target: O propietario de %@ configurou incorrectamente o seu sitio web. Para protexer a súa información contra roubos, Firefox non se conectou a este sitio web.
trans-unit.note: Warning text on the certificate error page
Title on the certificate error page
Label for button to go back from the error page

trans-unit.target: Visitar o sitio de todos os xeitos
trans-unit.note: Button label to temporarily continue to the site from the certificate error page

trans-unit.source: Open this link in the App Store?
trans-unit.target: Abrir esta ligazón na App Store?
trans-unit.note: Question shown to user when tapping a link that opens the App Store app

trans-unit.source: Open this link in external app?
trans-unit.note: Question shown to user when tapping an SMS or MailTo link that opens the external app for those.
Tile title for Facebook
Title for firefox about:home page in tab history list
Accessibility Label for the tab toolbar Forward button
Settings section title for Firefox Account
Button label to go to Firefox Account settings
Label when no internet is present
Button label to Sync your Firefox Account
Title of a notification displayed when another device has connected to FxA. %@ refers to the name of the newly connected device.
Title of a notification displayed when another device has connected to FxA.

trans-unit.source: This device has been successfully disconnected from Firefox Sync.
trans-unit.target: Este dispositivo desconectouse correctamente de Firefox Sync.
trans-unit.note: Body of a notification displayed when this device has been disconnected from FxA by another device.
Title of a notification displayed when this device has been disconnected by another device.

trans-unit.source: A device has disconnected from Firefox Sync
trans-unit.target: Un dispositivo desconectouse de Firefox Sync
trans-unit.note: Body of a notification displayed when unnamed device has been disconnected from FxA.
Body of a notification displayed when named device has been disconnected from FxA. %@ refers to the name of the disconnected device.
Title of a notification displayed when named device has been disconnected from FxA.
Show the SUMO support page from the Support section in the settings. see http://mzl.la/1dmM8tZ
Toggle history syncing setting
Title for button in the history panel to clear recent history
Option title to clear all browsing history.
Button to perform action to clear history for the last hour
Button to perform action to clear history for today only
Button to perform action to clear history for yesterday and today

trans-unit.source: Websites you’ve visited recently will show up here.
trans-unit.target: Aquí amósanse os sitios web que visitou recentemente.
trans-unit.note: Title for the History Panel empty state.

trans-unit.source: Your tabs from other devices show up here.
trans-unit.target: Aquí amósanse as lapelas dos outros dispositivos.
trans-unit.note: Description for the empty synced tabs null state in the History Panel

trans-unit.source: Sign in to view a list of tabs from your other devices.
trans-unit.target: Acceda para ver unha lista de lapelas dos outros dispositivos.
trans-unit.note: Description for the empty synced tabs 'not signed in' state in the History Panel
Title for the empty synced tabs state in the History Panel
Title for the Back to History button in the History Panel
Title for the Recently Closed button in the History Panel
The title for the Bookmark context menu action for sites in Home Panels
The title for the Delete from History context menu action for sites in Home Panels
The title for the Open in New Tab context menu action for sites in Home Panels
The title for the Remove context menu action for sites in Home Panels
The title for the Remove Bookmark context menu action for sites in Home Panels
The title for the Share context menu action for sites in Home Panels

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut to navigate backwards, through session history, inside the current tab. This label is displayed in the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of closing the current tab a user is in. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of finding text a user desires within a page. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of switching to a subsequent tab. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of creating a new private tab. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of creating a new tab. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of switching from Private Browsing to Normal Browsing Mode. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of switching from Normal Browsing mode to Private Browsing Mode. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of reloading the current page. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of directly accessing the URL, location, bar. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of switching to a subsequent tab. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of switching to a tab immediately preceding to the currently selected tab. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.
Accessibility label for button increasing font size in display settings of reader mode
This label is meant to signify the section containing a group of items from the past thirty days.
This label is meant to signify the section containing a group of items from the past seven days.
Settings item that opens a tab containing the licenses. See http://mzl.la/1NSAWCG
Light theme setting in Reading View settings
Link for going to the non-reader page when the reader view could not be loaded. This message will appear only when sharing to Firefox reader mode from another app.
Message displayed when the reader mode page is loading. This message will appear only when sharing to Firefox reader mode from another app.
Authentication prompt log in button
Toggle logins syncing setting
Button to not save the user's password
Button to not update the user's password
Prompt for saving a login. The first parameter is the username being saved. The second parameter is the hostname of the site.
Prompt for saving a password with no username. The parameter is the hostname of the site.
Prompt for updating a login. The first parameter is the hostname for which the password will be updated for.
Prompt for updating a login. The first parameter is the username for which the password will be updated for. The second parameter is the hostname of the site.
Button to save the user's password
Button to update the user's password
Placeholder test for search box in logins list view.
Title for the list of logins

trans-unit.id: Looks like Firefox crashed previously. Would you like to restore your tabs?
trans-unit.source: Looks like Firefox crashed previously. Would you like to restore your tabs?
trans-unit.target: Semella que Firefox se pechou inesperadamente. Desexa restaurar as súas lapelas?
trans-unit.note: Restore Tabs Prompt Description
Title for the button that marks a reading list item as read
Title for the button that marks a reading list item as unread
Toast displayed to the user after a bookmark has been added.
Toast displayed to the user after adding the item to their reading list.
The title for the button that lets you copy the url from the location bar.
Toast displayed to user after copy url pressed.

trans-unit.source: Protections are OFF for this site
trans-unit.target: As proteccións están DESACTIVADAS neste sitio
trans-unit.note: A switch to disable enhanced tracking protection inside the menu.

trans-unit.source: Protections are ON for this site
trans-unit.target: As proteccións están ACTIVADAS neste sitio
trans-unit.note: A switch to enable enhanced tracking protection inside the menu.
The title for the button that lets you paste into the location bar
The title for the button that lets you paste and go to a URL

trans-unit.target: Recargar con protección contra o seguimento
trans-unit.note: Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to reload the current website with Tracking Protection enabled

trans-unit.target: Recargar sen protección contra o seguimento
trans-unit.note: Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to reload the current website without Tracking Protection
Toast displayed to the user after a bookmark has been removed.
Toast displayed to the user after a tab has been sent successfully.
The title for tracking protection settings
The title that shows the number of content cookies blocked
The title that shows the number of social URLs blocked
The title that shows the number of cross-site URLs blocked
The title that shows the number of cryptomining scripts blocked

trans-unit.source: Websites may load outside ads, videos, and other content that contains hidden trackers. Blocking this can make websites load faster, but some buttons, forms, and login fields, might not work.
trans-unit.target: Algúns sitios web poden cargar anuncios externos, vídeos e outros contidos con rastrexadores ocultos. Bloquealos fará que os sitios web carguen más rápido, pero tamén é posible que algúns botóns, formularios e campos de acceso deixen de funcionar.
trans-unit.note: Description of content trackers.

trans-unit.source: These cookies follow you from site to site to gather data about what you do online. They are set by third parties such as advertisers and analytics companies.
trans-unit.target: Estes rastros fanlle seguimento entre sitios web para obter información sobre o que fai en liña. Están configurados por empresas externas de anuncios e de analítica web.
trans-unit.note: Description of cross-site trackers.

trans-unit.source: Cryptominers secretly use your system’s computing power to mine digital money. Cryptomining scripts drain your battery, slow down your computer, and can increase your energy bill.
trans-unit.target: Os mineiros de criptodivisas utilizan de forma secreta a potencia de computación do seu equipo para obter criptodivisas. Os scripts de minería de criptodivisas esgotan a batería, desaceleran o equipo e aumentan a factura da luz.
trans-unit.note: Description of cryptominers.

trans-unit.source: The settings on your browser and computer are unique. Fingerprinters collect a variety of these unique settings to create a profile of you, which can be used to track you as you browse.
trans-unit.target: A configuración do seu navegador e equipo é única. Os detectores de pegada dixital recopilan unha gran parte desa configuración única para crear un perfil de vostede e facerlle seguimento mentres navega.
trans-unit.note: Description of fingerprinters.

trans-unit.source: Social networks place trackers on other websites to build a more complete and targeted profile of you. Blocking these trackers reduces how much social media companies can see what do you online.
trans-unit.target: As redes sociais colocan rastrexadores para que outros sitios web constrúan un perfil máis completo de vostede. Se bloquea estes rastrexadores, moitas empresas de medios sociais deixarán de ter acceso aos seus datos e non poderán ver as súas actividades en liña.
trans-unit.note: Description of social network trackers.
The title that shows the number of fingerprinting scripts blocked
The title for the option to view the What's new page.
Accessibility label for the navigation toolbar displayed at the bottom of the screen.
Restore Tabs Negative Action
Message spoken by VoiceOver to indicate that there are no tabs in the Tabs Tray
OK button
Restore Tabs Affirmative Action
Title for prompt displayed to user after the app crashes
See http://mzl.la/1G7uHo7
Toggle tabs syncing setting

trans-unit.id: Open articles in Reader View by tapping the book icon when it appears in the title bar.
trans-unit.source: Open articles in Reader View by tapping the book icon when it appears in the title bar.
trans-unit.target: Abra artigos na vista de lectura pulsando na icona do libro cando apareza na barra de título.
trans-unit.note: See http://mzl.la/1LXbDOL

trans-unit.source: Firefox cannot open the page because it has an invalid address.
trans-unit.target: Non é posíbel que Firefox abra a páxina porque o enderezo non é válido.
trans-unit.note: The message displayed to a user when they try to open a URL that cannot be handled by Firefox, or any external app.

trans-unit.target: Non foi posíbel abrir a páxina
trans-unit.note: Title of the message shown when the user attempts to navigate to an invalid link.
Password textbox in Authentication prompt

trans-unit.source: This allows you to save the image to your Camera Roll.
trans-unit.target: Isto permítelle gardar a imaxe no seu carrete.
trans-unit.note: See http://mzl.la/1G7uHo7

trans-unit.source: Firefox would like to access your Photos
trans-unit.target: Firefox quere acceder ás súas fotos
trans-unit.note: See http://mzl.la/1G7uHo7
Button for closing the menu action sheet
Privacy section title
Show Firefox Browser Privacy Policy page from the Privacy section in the settings. See https://www.mozilla.org/privacy/firefox/
Title for quick-search engines settings section.
Accessibility label for the Reader View button
Accessibility message e.g. spoken by VoiceOver when Reader Mode becomes available.
Panel accessibility label
Title for the Recently Closed Tabs Panel
Accessibility Label for the tab toolbar Reload button
Accessibility label for the reload button
Title for the button that removes a reading list item
Name for button removing current article from reading list in reader mode
Cancel button text shown in reopen-alert at home page.
Reopen button text shown in reopen-alert at home page.
Reopen alert title shown at home page.
Accessibility label for button resetting font size in display settings of reader mode
Font type setting in the reading view settings

trans-unit.id: Save pages to your Reading List by tapping the book plus icon in the Reader View controls.
trans-unit.source: Save pages to your Reading List by tapping the book plus icon in the Reader View controls.
trans-unit.target: Garde páxinas na súa lista de lectura pulsando a icona do libro nos controis da vista de lectura.
trans-unit.note: See http://mzl.la/1LXbDOL
OK button to dismiss the error prompt.

trans-unit.source: Align QR code within frame to scan
trans-unit.target: Encadra o código QR no marco para examinalo
trans-unit.note: Text for the instructions label, displayed in the QR scanner view
Text of the prompt that is shown to the user when the data is invalid
Title for the QR code scanner view.
Open search section of settings
The text shown in the URL bar on about:home

trans-unit.source: The new search engine will appear in the quick search bar.
trans-unit.target: O novo buscador aparecerá na barra de busca rápida.
trans-unit.note: The message that asks the user to Add the search provider explaining where the search engine will appear
The success message that appears after a user sucessfully adds a new search engine
The title that asks the user to Add the search provider
The cancel button if you do not want to add a search engine.

trans-unit.source: A search engine with this title or URL has already been added.
trans-unit.target: Xa engadiu un buscador con este título ou URL.
trans-unit.note: A message explaining fault in custom search engine form.
A title stating that we failed to add custom search engine.

trans-unit.source: The search provider could not be added.
trans-unit.target: Non foi posíbel engadir o buscador.
trans-unit.note: A title explaining that we failed to add a search engine
A title explaining that we failed to add a search engine
A message explaining fault in custom search engine form.
A title stating that we failed to add custom search engine.
The confirmation button
Menu item in settings used to open input.mozilla.org where people can submit feedback
Used as a button label for crash dialog prompt

trans-unit.id: Send a crash report so Mozilla can fix the problem?
trans-unit.source: Send a crash report so Mozilla can fix the problem?
trans-unit.target: Enviar un informe de erro para que Mozilla poida solucionar o problema?
trans-unit.note: Message displayed in the crash dialog above the buttons used to select when sending reports
Button title for cancelling share screen
Header for the list of devices table

trans-unit.source: Only HTTP and HTTPS links can be shared.
trans-unit.target: Só se poden compartir ligazóns HTTP e HTTPS.
trans-unit.note: Message in error prompt explaining why the URL is invalid.
OK button to dismiss the error prompt.

trans-unit.source: The link you are trying to share cannot be shared.
trans-unit.target: Non é posíbel compartir a ligazón.
trans-unit.note: Title of error prompt displayed when an invalid URL is shared.
Title of the dialog that allows you to send a tab to a different device

trans-unit.source: You don’t have any other devices connected to this Firefox Account available to sync.
trans-unit.target: Non ten ningún outro dispositivo conectado a esta conta de Firefox dispoñíbel para sincronizarse.
trans-unit.note: Error message shown in the remote tabs panel

trans-unit.source: Please open Firefox, go to Settings and sign in to continue.
trans-unit.target: Abra Firefox, vaia á configuración e identifíquese para continuar.
trans-unit.note: See http://mzl.la/1ISlXnU

trans-unit.source: You are not signed in to your Firefox Account.
trans-unit.target: Non se identificou coa súa conta de Firefox.
trans-unit.note: See http://mzl.la/1ISlXnU
Navigation bar button to Send the current page to a device
Body of notification received after a spurious message from FxA has been received.
Title of notification received after a spurious message from FxA has been received.
Label for an action used to view one or more tabs from a notification.

trans-unit.source: New tab arrived from another device.
trans-unit.target: Recibiuse unha lapela nova dende outro dispositivo.
trans-unit.note: Body of notification shown when the device is sent one or more tabs from an unnamed device.
Title of notification shown when the device is sent one or more tabs from an unnamed device.
Body of notification shown when the device is sent one or more tabs from the named device. %@ is the placeholder for the app name.
Title of notification shown when the device is sent one or more tabs from the named device. %@ is the placeholder for the device name. This device name will be localized by that device.
Sepia theme setting in Reading View settings
Font type setting in the reading view settings
Title in the settings view controller title bar
The button text in Search Settings that opens the Custom Search Engine view.
The text on the Save button when saving a custom search engine
The title of the Custom Search Engine view.
The title for the field which sets the title for a custom search engine.
The placeholder for Title Field when saving a custom search engine.
The title for URL Field
The placeholder for URL Field when saving a custom search engine

trans-unit.target: Borrar todos os datos de sitios web
trans-unit.note: Button in Data Management that clears all items.
Button in settings that clears private data for the selected items.
Label used as an item in Settings. When touched it will open a dialog prompting the user to make sure they want to clear all of their private data.
Copy app version alert shown in settings.
Default text in search bar for Data Management
Label used as an item in Settings. When touched it will open a dialog prompting the user to make sure they want to clear all of their private data.
Title displayed in header of the setting panel.

trans-unit.source: Firefox will stop syncing with your account, but won’t delete any of your browsing data on this device.
trans-unit.target: Firefox deterá a sincronización coa súa conta, pero non eliminará ningún dos seus datos de navegación neste dispositivo.
trans-unit.note: Body of the alert when prompting the user asking to disconnect.
Button displayed at the bottom of settings page allowing users to Disconnect from FxA
Cancel action button in alert when user is prompted for disconnect
Destructive action button in alert when user is prompted for disconnect
Title of the alert when prompting the user asking to disconnect.
Section header for brightness slider.
Display (theme) settings label to show if manually switch theme is enabled.
Display (theme) settings switch subtitle, explaining the title 'Manually'.
Display (theme) setting to choose the theme manually.
Option choice in display theme settings for dark theme
Option choice in display theme settings for light theme

trans-unit.source: The theme will automatically change based on your display brightness. You can set the threshold where the theme changes. The circle indicates your display’s current brightness.
trans-unit.target: O tema cambiará automaticamente en función do brillo da súa pantalla. Pode definir o límite no que o tema cambia. O círculo indica o brillo actual da súa pantalla.
trans-unit.note: Display (theme) settings footer describing how the brightness slider works.
Switch mode settings section title

trans-unit.source: Switch automatically based on screen brightness
trans-unit.target: Cambiar automaticamente en función do brillo da pantalla
trans-unit.note: Display (theme) settings switch subtitle, explaining the title 'Automatically'.
Display (theme) settings switch to choose whether to set the dark mode manually, or automatically based on the brightness slider.
System theme settings section title

trans-unit.target: Usar o modo claro ou escuro do sistema
trans-unit.note: System theme settings switch to choose whether to use the same theme as the system
Theme picker settings section title
Title in main app settings for Theme settings
Label used for the device name settings section.
Label used as a section title in the Firefox Accounts Settings screen.
Title displayed in header of the FxA settings panel.
General settings section title
Label used as an item in Settings. When touched it will open a dialog to configure the home page and its uses.
Title of the setting section containing the URL of the current home page.
Button in settings to use the current page as home page.
Title for the logins and passwords screen. Translation could just use 'Logins' if the title is too long
Label used to set a custom url as the new tab option (homepage).
Option in settings to show a blank page when you open a new tab
Option in settings to show Firefox Home when you open a new tab
Option in settings to show your homepage when you open a new tab
Label used as an item in Settings. When touched it will open a dialog to configure the new tab behavior.
Title displayed in header of the setting panel.
Label at the top of the New Tab screen after entering New Tab in settings

trans-unit.source: Choose what to load when opening a new tab
trans-unit.target: Escolla que amosar ao abrir unha nova lapela
trans-unit.note: Footer at the bottom of the New Tab screen after entering New Tab in settings
Description displayed under the ”Offer to Open Copied Link” option. See https://bug1223660.bmoattachments.org/attachment.cgi?id=8898349
Title of setting to enable the Go to Copied URL feature. See https://bug1223660.bmoattachments.org/attachment.cgi?id=8898349

trans-unit.target: Abrir as ligazóns de corre con
trans-unit.note: Title for Open With Settings
Label used as an item in Settings. When touched it will open a dialog to configure the open with (mail links) behavior.
Setting to enable the built-in password manager
Button displayed at the top of the search settings.
Button displayed at the top of the search settings.
title for a link that explains how mozilla collects telemetry

trans-unit.source: Mozilla strives to only collect what we need to provide and improve Firefox for everyone.
trans-unit.target: Mozilla esforzase por recoller só os datos necesarios para fornecer e mellorar Firefox para todos.
trans-unit.note: A short description that explains why mozilla collects usage data.
The title for the setting to send usage data.
Description displayed under the ”Show Link Previews” option
Title of setting to enable link previews when long-pressing links.
Setting to show Logins & Passwords quick access in the application menu
The description of the open new tab siri shortcut

trans-unit.source: Use Siri shortcuts to quickly open Firefox via Siri
trans-unit.target: Usar os atallos de Siri para abrir rapidamente Firefox a través de Siri
trans-unit.note: The description that describes what siri shortcuts are
The option that takes you to the siri shortcuts settings page
Dismiss button for the tracker protection alert.

trans-unit.source: If a site doesn’t work as expected, tap the lock in the address bar and turn off Enhanced Tracking Protection for that page.
trans-unit.target: Se un sitio non funciona correctamente, toque o cadeado na barra de enderezos e desactive a protección avanzada de seguimento para esa páxina.
trans-unit.note: Decription for the tracker protection alert.
Title for the tracker protection alert.
The Title on info view which shows a list of all blocked websites
'Learn more' info link on the Tracking Protection settings screen.

trans-unit.source: Reduces targeted ads and helps stop advertisers from tracking your browsing.
trans-unit.target: Reduce os anuncios personalizados e axuda a impedir que os anunciantes rastrexen a súa navegación.
trans-unit.note: Additional information about your Enhanced Tracking Protection

trans-unit.source: If a site doesn’t work as expected, tap the lock in the address bar and turn off Enhanced Tracking Protection for that page.
trans-unit.target: Se un sitio non funciona como esperaba, toque o cadeado na barra de enderezos e desactive a protección avanzada de seguimento para esa páxina.
trans-unit.note: Footer information for tracker protection level.

trans-unit.source: Allows some ad tracking so websites function properly.
trans-unit.target: Permite parte do seguimento dos anuncios para que os sitios web funcionen correctamente.
trans-unit.note: Description for standard level tracker protection

trans-unit.source: Blocks more trackers, ads, and popups. Pages load faster, but some functionality may not work.
trans-unit.target: Bloquea máis rastrexadores, anuncios e xanelas emerxentes. As páxinas cargan máis rápido pero algunhas das súas funcionalidades poden fallar.
trans-unit.note: Description for strict level tracker protection
Title for tracking protection options section where level can be selected.
Row in top-level of settings that gets tapped to show the tracking protection settings detail view.
Tracking protection settings option for using the basic blocklist.
Tracking protection settings option for using the strict blocklist.
Settings option to specify that Tracking Protection is on
Title of link to help page to find out how to solve Sync issues
Button shows all websites on website data tableview

trans-unit.source: This action will clear all of your website data. It cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: Esta acción borrará todos os datos dos sitios web. Non é posíbel desfacer esta acción.
trans-unit.note: Description of the confirmation dialog shown when a user tries to clear their private data.
Title displayed in header of the Data Management panel.
Action label on share extension to add page to the Firefox reading list.
Share extension label shown after user has performed 'Add to Reading List' action.
Action label on share extension to bookmark the page in Firefox.
Share extension label shown after user has performed 'Bookmark this Page' action.
Action label on share extension to load the page in Firefox when user switches apps to bring it to foreground.
Share extension label shown after user has performed 'Load in Background' action.
Action label on share extension to immediately open page in Firefox.
Action label on share extension to search for the selected text in Firefox.
Label for show search suggestions setting.
Accessibility label for the tabs button in the (top) tab toolbar
Show the on-boarding screen again from the settings
Accessibility Label for the tab toolbar Stop button
Support section title

trans-unit.id: Swipe right or left with three fingers to close the tab.
trans-unit.source: Swipe right or left with three fingers to close the tab.
trans-unit.target: Deslice á dereita ou á esquerda con tres dedos para pechar a lapela.
trans-unit.note: Accessibility hint for tab tray's displayed tab.
Message displayed when the user's account is syncing with ellipsis at the end
Title for Sync status message when Sync failed due to being offline

Message spoken by VoiceOver saying the position of the single currently visible tab in Tabs Tray, along with the total number of tabs. E.g. \"Tab 2 of 5\" says that tab 2 is visible (and is the only visible tab), out of 5 tabs total.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of showing the tab tray. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.
Accessibility label for the Add Tab button in the Tab Tray.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of closing all tabs from the tab tray. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.

A label indicating the keyboard shortcut of opening a new tab in the tab tray. This label is displayed inside the Discoverability overlay when a user presses the Command key. The Discoverability overlay and shortcut become available only when a user has connected a hardware keyboard to an iPad. See https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gH3tbvDceg7yG5N67NIHS-AXgDgCzBHN/view?usp=sharing for more details.
The title for the tab tray

Message spoken by VoiceOver saying the range of tabs that are currently visible in Tabs Tray, along with the total number of tabs. E.g. \"Tabs 8 to 10 of 15\" says tabs 8, 9 and 10 are visible, out of 15 tabs total.
Accessibility label for the Tabs Tray view.
The button to undo the delete all tabs
The label indicating that all the tabs were closed

trans-unit.id: The page could not be displayed in Reader View.
trans-unit.source: The page could not be displayed in Reader View.
trans-unit.target: Non foi posíbel amosar a páxina na vista de lectura.
trans-unit.note: Message displayed when the reader mode page could not be loaded. This message will appear only when sharing to Firefox reader mode from another app.

trans-unit.id: There was a problem accessing tabs from your other devices. Try again in a few moments.
trans-unit.source: There was a problem accessing tabs from your other devices. Try again in a few moments.
trans-unit.target: Produciuse un problema accedendo as lapelas dos outros dispositivos. Tente de novo nuns momentos.
trans-unit.note: Error message in the remote tabs panel

trans-unit.id: There was an error converting the page
trans-unit.source: There was an error converting the page
trans-unit.target: Produciuse un erro ao converter a páxina
trans-unit.note: Error displayed when reader mode cannot be enabled
label for Not Now button
Open App Store button
Label for button to undo the action just performed
This label is meant to signify the section containing a group of items from the current day.
Accessibility label for the Menu button.
Accessibility label for the Close All Tabs menu button.
Button shown in editing mode to remove this site from the top sites panel.
Button to disallow the page to be translated to the user locale language
Button to allow the page to be translated to the user locale language

trans-unit.source: This page appears to be in %1$@. Translate to %2$@ with %3$@?
trans-unit.target: Esta páxina parece estar en %1$@. Quere traducila ao %2$@ con %3$@?
trans-unit.note: Prompt for translation. The first parameter is the language the page is in. The second parameter is the name of our local language. The third is the name of the service.
Tile title for Twitter
The menu item that pastes the current contents of the clipboard into the URL bar and navigates to the page
Search in New Tab Text selection menu item
Debug option
Username textbox in Authentication prompt
Accessibility label for the main web content view

trans-unit.target: Benvida a súa lista de lectura
trans-unit.note: See http://mzl.la/1LXbDOL
Restore Tabs Prompt Title
Tile title for Wikipedia
This label is meant to signify the section containing a group of items from the past 24 hours.

trans-unit.id: You don’t have any tabs open in Firefox on your other devices.
trans-unit.source: You don’t have any tabs open in Firefox on your other devices.
trans-unit.target: Non ten ningunha lapela aberta en Firefox nos outros dispositivos.
trans-unit.note: Error message in the remote tabs panel
Tile title for YouTube
Your Rights settings section title
FxA sign in view subtitle

trans-unit.source: On your computer open Firefox and go to firefox.com/pair
trans-unit.target: Abra Firefox no computador e vaia a firefox.com/pair
trans-unit.note: FxA sign in view qr code instructions
FxA sign in view qr code scan button

trans-unit.target: Ou usar un enderezo de correo electrónico
trans-unit.note: FxA sign in view email login button
Relative time for a tab that was visited within the last few moments.
Accessibility label for Mobile Device image in remote tabs list
Relative date for dates older than a month and less than two months.
Description for a date more than a week ago, but less than a month ago.
Accessibility label for read article in reading list. It's a past participle - functions as an adjective.
Relative date for date in past week.
Relative date for date older than a minute.
Accessibility label for unread article in reading list. It's a past participle - functions as an adjective.
Relative date for yesterday.
Prompt title when deleting logins
Prompt option for cancelling out of deletion
Accessibility message e.g. spoken by VoiceOver after the user taps the close button in the search field to clear the search and exit search mode
Copy password text selection menu item
Label describing when the current login was created with the timestamp as the parameter.
Label for the button used to delete the current login.
Label for the button used to deselect all logins.
Accessibility label for entering search mode for logins
Hide password text selection menu item
Prompt message warning the user that deleting non-synced logins will permanently remove them

trans-unit.id: Logins will be removed from all connected devices.
trans-unit.source: Logins will be removed from all connected devices.
trans-unit.target: As identificacións retiraranse de todos os dispositivos conectados.
trans-unit.note: Prompt message warning the user that deleted logins will remove logins from all connected devices
Label describing when the current login was last modified with the timestamp as the parameter.
Label displayed when no logins are found after searching.
Open and Fill website text selection menu item
Label displayed above the password row in Login Detail View.
Reveal password text selection menu item
Title for the search field at the top of the Logins list screen
Accessibility label for the search input field in the Logins list
Label for the button used to select all logins.
Label displayed above the username row in Login Detail View.
Label displayed above the website row in Login Detail View.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to close all tabs currently open.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the toolbar to search for text within the current page.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open a new private tab.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open a new tab
Accessibility label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the Bookmarks home panel. Please keep as short as possible, <15 chars of space available.
Accessibility label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the Downloads home panel. Please keep as short as possible, <15 chars of space available.
Accessibility label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the History home panel. Please keep as short as possible, <15 chars of space available.
Accessibility label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the Reading list home panel. Please keep as short as possible, <15 chars of space available.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the Settings menu.
Accessibility label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the Synced Tabs home panel. Please keep as short as possible, <15 chars of space available.
Label for the button, displayed in Firefox Home, used to see all Library panels.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to open the share dialog.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to request the desktop version of the current website.
Label for the button, displayed in the menu, used to request the mobile version of the current website.
Setting for closing private tabs
Context menu option for opening a link in a new private tab
Toggled OFF accessibility value
Toggled ON accessibility value
Title displayed for when there are no open tabs while in private mode
Accessibility label for toggling on/off private mode

trans-unit.id: Turns private mode on or off
trans-unit.source: Turns private mode on or off
trans-unit.target: Activa ou desactiva o modo privado
trans-unit.note: Accessiblity hint for toggling on/off private mode
Will be displayed in Settings under 'Close Private Tabs'
Label for search engine buttons. The argument corresponds to the name of the search engine.
Label for search settings button.
A brief descriptive name for this app on this device, used for Send Tab and Synced Tabs. The first argument is the app name. The second argument is the device name.
The name of the folder that contains desktop bookmarks in the menu. This should match bookmarks.folder.menu.label on Android.
The name of the folder that contains desktop bookmarks in the toolbar. This should match bookmarks.folder.toolbar.label on Android.
The title of the folder that contains mobile bookmarks. This should match bookmarks.folder.mobile.label on Android.
The name of the folder that contains unsorted desktop bookmarks. This should match bookmarks.folder.unfiled.label on Android.
Close Private Tabs button label
Close Private Tabs

trans-unit.source: Add Firefox shortcuts to your Home screen.
trans-unit.target: Engada atallos de Firefox á súa pantalla de inicio.
trans-unit.note: Description for medium size widget to add Firefox Shortcut to home screen
Go to link pasted on the clipboard
Go to copied link
%d represents number and it becomes something like +5 more where 5 is the number of open tabs in tab tray beyond what is displayed in the widget
Open New Tab button label
Label that is shown when there are no tabs opened in tab tray i.e. Empty State
Open Firefox when there are no tabs opened in tab tray i.e. Empty State
Open New Private Tab button label

trans-unit.source: Add a Firefox shortcut to your Home screen. After adding the widget, touch and hold to edit it and select a different shortcut.
trans-unit.target: Engada un atallo de Firefox á súa pantalla de inicio. Despois de engadir o widget, manteña premido para editalo e seleccione un atallo diferente.
trans-unit.note: Description for small size widget to add it to home screen
Quick Actions title when widget enters edit mode

trans-unit.source: Add shortcuts to your open tabs.
trans-unit.target: Engada atallos as súas lapelas abertas.
trans-unit.note: Description for Quick View widget in Gallery View where user can add it to home screen
Title for Quick View widget in Gallery View where user can add it to home screen
Search in Firefox. Do not translate the word Firefox
Search in private tab

trans-unit.source: Add shortcuts to frequently and recently visited sites.
trans-unit.target: Engadir atallos aos sitios visitados con frecuencia e recentemente.
trans-unit.note: Description for top sites widget to add Firefox top sites shotcuts to home screen
Title for top sites widget to add Firefox top sites shotcuts to home screen
Quick Actions drop down menu item for Go to Copied Link when widget enters edit mode and drop down menu expands

trans-unit.source: Just to confirm, you wanted ‘Go to Copied Link’?
trans-unit.target: Só para confirmar, quería «Ir á ligazón copiada»?
trans-unit.note: Accessibility label to confirm the go to copied link selection

trans-unit.source: Just to confirm, you wanted ‘Clear Private Tabs’?
trans-unit.target: Só para confirmar, quería «Borrar as lapelas privadas»?
trans-unit.note: Accessibility label to confirm the Clear Private Tabs selection

trans-unit.source: Just to confirm, you wanted ‘New Private Search’?
trans-unit.target: Só para confirmar, quería unha «Nova busca privada»?
trans-unit.note: Accessibility label to confirm the New Private Search selection

trans-unit.source: Just to confirm, you wanted ‘New Search’?
trans-unit.target: Só para confirmar, quería unha «Nova busca»?
trans-unit.note: Accessibility label to confirm the New Search selection

trans-unit.source: Quick access to various Firefox actions
trans-unit.target: Acceso rápido a varias accións de Firefox
trans-unit.note: Description of the collection of widgets
Quick Actions drop down menu item for lear Private Tabs when widget enters edit mode and drop down menu expands
The description of a customizable section of the widget
Title of the quick actions widgets

trans-unit.source: There are ${count} options matching ‘Go to Copied Link’.
trans-unit.target: Hai ${count} opcións que coinciden con «Ir á ligazón copiada».
trans-unit.note: Label showing how many widgets match ‘Go to Copied Link’. ${count} is a placeholder fo the number of widgets.

trans-unit.source: There are ${count} options matching ‘Clear Private Tabs’.
trans-unit.target: Hai ${count} opcións que coinciden con «Borrar pestanas privadas».
trans-unit.note: Label showing how many widgets match ‘Clear Private Tabs’. ${count} is a placeholder fo the number of widgets.

trans-unit.source: There are ${count} options matching ‘New Private Search’.
trans-unit.target: Hai ${count} opcións que coinciden con «Nova busca privada».
trans-unit.note: Label showing how many widgets match ‘New Private Search’. ${count} is a placeholder fo the number of widgets.

trans-unit.target: Hai ${count} opcións que coinciden con «Nova busca».
trans-unit.note: Label showing how many widgets match ‘New Search’. ${count} is a placeholder fo the number of widgets.
Quick Actions drop down menu item for new private search when widget enters edit mode and drop down menu expands
Quick Actions left label text for dropdown menu when widget enters edit mode
Quick Actions drop down menu item for new search when widget enters edit mode and drop down menu expands
No comment provided by engineer.
